title: Small Ships
description: Vanilla friendly Ships for Minecraft. Now with cannons!
body: # Small Ships *Medieval-inspired ships for exploration, trade, and naval battles!* --- ## Play with Friends! Want to play together with your friends? Check out **DatHost** for the best performance and easy setup! ### How to Get Started 1. Go to [**DatHost using my Link**](https://dathost.net/r/talhanation/minecraft-server-hosting) 2. Register your account. 3. Once registered, choose the plan that fits your needs 4. The **30% discount will be applied automatically** at checkout. **Important:** The discount only works if you order your server using this [** my Link**](https://dathost.net/r/talhanation/minecraft-server-hosting) ! [![DatHost](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/d6ec0353-37bd-4f09-a427-694da9f8c500)](https://dathost.net/minecraft-server-hosting?ref=talhanation) --- ## Showcase ## My Other Mods ### [![recruits-icon](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/20dc335a-fdcd-4075-a317-4047c040a020)](https://modrinth.com/mod/villager-recruits) [**Villager Recruits**](https://modrinth.com/mod/villager-recruits): Command your own **Villager Army** into war! Now with **Diplomacy and Factions**! --- ### [![workers-icon](https://github.com/talhanation/wiki/assets/10392726/7b2f12d9-793a-491f-ba0a-c91bc3bf9e2c)](https://modrinth.com/mod/villager-workers) [**Villager Workers**](https://modrinth.com/mod/villager-workers): Hire Villagers and let them **work for you**! --- ### [![smallships-icon](https://github.com/talhanation/wiki/assets/10392726/1c579ef7-61a9-404a-bd37-99be59930b5b)](https://modrinth.com/mod/small-ships) [**Small Ships**](https://modrinth.com/mod/small-ships): Explore the oceans in your **own sailable ships**! --- ### [![siegeweapons-icon](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/0e78b9e3-0d34-47a4-802e-adf55eec21e3)](https://modrinth.com/mod/siegeweapons) [**Siege Weapons**](https://modrinth.com/mod/siegeweapons): Prepare for war. Build your siege weapon. Dominate the battlefield.**! --- ## Explanation - Place the ship far away into water – they need space to spawn. - Right-click to sit in the ship. - **While sitting in the Ship:** - Press **R** to open/close the sail. - **W / S** to increase or decrease sail speed. - Third Person View (**F5**) + Mousewheel = Adjust camera distance. - Right-click an entity to dismount it from the ship. - To open inventory outside of the ship: **crouch + right-click**. ### Cannons - Add a cannon with right-click while holding one. - Shoot cannons with **Space** while looking in their direction (requires cannonballs in ship inventory). - Remove a cannon with a pickaxe. - Key-binds can be changed in options. --- ## Detailed Features ### Ship Performance - **Cold-water ships** → 10% faster in cold biomes, 10% slower in warm. - **Warm-water ships** → 10% faster in warm biomes, 10% slower in cold. - Each cannon decreases speed by **2.5%**. - Cargo can decrease speed by up to **10%**. ### Sail Coloring - Right-click with dye to color sails. ### Ship Repairing - Repair with iron nuggets and planks. ### Ship Naming - Use a nametag to name your ship. ### Leashing *(1.18.2 – 1.20.6)* - Tether ships (only if no player is controlling them). --- ## Ships ### Cog - Medieval trade ship (cold water). - **108 slots**, up to **4 cannons**, **5 passengers**. - Speed: **40 km/h**, Hull: **300 HP**. ### Brigg - Two-masted medieval trade ship (cold water). - **162 slots**, up to **6 cannons**, **11 passengers**. - Speed: **45 km/h**, Hull: **400 HP**. ### Galley - Naval warfare ship (warm water). - **54 slots**, **9 passengers**. - Speed: **40 km/h**, Hull: **200 HP**. ### Drakkar - Viking-style ship (cold water). - **54 slots**, **11 passengers**, ice-breaker ability. - Shields with banner patterns for defense. - Speed: **30 km/h**, Hull: **200 HP**. --- ## Crafting **Sail** **Cannon** **Cannon Ball** **Cog** **Brigg** **Galley** **Drakkar** --- ## Small Ships Wiki 👉 [Visit the Wiki for a full overview](https://github.com/talhanation/wiki/wiki/Small-Ships-Wiki) --- ## Modpack Permissions You are allowed to use the Small Ships Mod in any modpack, as long as you link back to this page and don’t make money off of it. ---
